title: Disclosure Test? Bob Lazar on the 'Container' theory
summary: A brief discussion about Bob Lazar and a meta conspiracy theory suggesting he may have been used as a 'disclosure test' by a government program. The conversation focuses on disturbing content Lazar allegedly read in briefings, specifically that aliens view humans as 'containers.'

key_claims.claim: Bob Lazar may have been used as a 'disclosure test' by the program to gauge public reaction
Bob Lazar read in briefing documents that aliens refer to humans as 'containers'
The briefing documents allegedly describe humans as 'containers' - possibly containers of souls
